'''Bard Cobral''', a member of the criminal [[Cobral family]], was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Fregan]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Frego]]. Bard was the brother of [[Solan Cobral]] and [[Rutin Cobral]], and the son of [[Zanita Cobral]] and [[Cobral father|her husband]]. He killed [[Lena Cobral]]'s cousin, [[Mica (Fregan)|Mica]], during an attempt to apprehend Lena and prevent her from testifying against the family.

{{Char-stub}}
